basic_info.short_form: Ghanshyamdas Saraf College of Arts and Commerce Mumbai

address.address: Rajasthani Sammelan’s Educational Complex, S. V. Road, Malad (West) India
address.map_location: Ghanshyamdas Saraf College of Arts and Commerce, Mumbai

pos_sentences.text: I liked the faculty. They are knowledgeable and friendly .I like how they manage students and teaching methods.i learn alot from them.
pos_sentences.name: Kausar ansari

pos_sentences.text: Library of the college is so cool and standard and well maintained
pos_sentences.name: Harsh Mishra

pos_sentences.text: Lab of the college is fully equipped with ambience
pos_sentences.name: Harsh Mishra

pos_sentences.text: Cultural association of our college which brings out the fun inside us
pos_sentences.name: Nandita prajapati

pos_sentences.text: Games associated with knowledge is the thing that every student carves for
pos_sentences.name: Nandita prajapati

pos_sentences.text: Seminar and career guidance lecture as well as for share market
pos_sentences.name: Khushi

pos_sentences.text: The Things I liked the most about the college campus is College Auditorium which is quite Larger than the other colleges. The second thing is the Teachers Staffroom
pos_sentences.name: Yash Chauhan

pos_sentences.text: limited students in a class, it makes teachers attention towards students more.
pos_sentences.name: Mohd Rehan Shaikh

pos_sentences.text: They helped everyone individually to improve
pos_sentences.name: Anand Singh

neg_sentences.text: Sometimes we can't get to use lifts because only professor can use it then u have to go from stairs
neg_sentences.name: Kausar ansari

neg_sentences.text: Some profesor's teaching method like accounts I can't understand method and techniques
neg_sentences.name: Kausar ansari

neg_sentences.text: I don't like timing of college sometimes u have to go at 6 o'clock and sometimes at 12 o'clock
neg_sentences.name: Kausar ansari

neg_sentences.text: Canteen is very poor no good dishes and not properly maintained
neg_sentences.name: Harsh Mishra

neg_sentences.text: Classroom is not available all the time because of more students
neg_sentences.name: Harsh Mishra

neg_sentences.text: Schedule of exams without any gap between the exams
neg_sentences.name: Nandita prajapati

neg_sentences.text: Amenities like Gymkhana which we can't avail
neg_sentences.name: Nandita prajapati

neg_sentences.text: Light and fans are not proper in classroom sometimes
neg_sentences.name: Khushi

neg_sentences.text: Need to have good infrastructure and clean washrooms
neg_sentences.name: Mohd Rehan Shaikh

neg_sentences.text: They did not even got us any placement after passing
neg_sentences.name: Anand Singh
